channel.title: FE — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on FE (FirstEnergy) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED FE (+198%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added FE in Q4 2025 · 1.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: David Tepper: EXITED FE (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) exited FE in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: François Rochon: EXITED FE (-100%) · Q4 2025
